ballad.selog
类 BasicLogger

java.lang.Object
  ballad.selog.BasicLogger
直接已知子类：
Logger
public abstract class BasicLogger
extends java.lang.Object

SimplE LOG (SELOG) -- A lightweight log tool for Java.

Basic Logger, define the basic output method and type, new Logger can extend this class.

The #Logger class extends from this class, so if you have question, you can see this class.

版本：
0.1 2011/11/17
作者：
Ballad

字段摘要
private static java.io.FileWriter fileWriter
          The FileWriter for output the log in file.
private static java.lang.String logFileName
          The name of log file if the log printed in file.
protected static int logLevel
          The level of print log.
protected static int logType
          The type of print log.
protected  java.lang.String projectName
          The project name your want to print in log.
 
构造方法摘要
protected BasicLogger()
          Default Constructor.
protected BasicLogger(java.lang.String name)
          Constructor with evaluate the projcetName.
 
方法摘要
protected  void closeLogConfig()
          When program exit, call this method to close the FileWriter.
protected static void initLogConfig(int logLevelPara, int logTypePara, java.lang.String logFileNamePara)
          When program start, call this initial method.
protected  void print(java.lang.String logCont)
          Print the log.
private  void printToConsole(java.lang.String logFullCont)
          Print the log's content to console.
protected  void printToFile(java.lang.String logFullCont)
          Print the log's content to file.

clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
